messages.content:
✅ **Done.**

```
$ git push origin main
   cb38045..28e8d93  main -> main

$ git push origin v2.5.13 v2.5.14 v2.5.15 v2.5.16
 * [new tag]         v2.5.13 -> v2.5.13
 * [new tag]         v2.5.14 -> v2.5.14
 * [new tag]         v2.5.15 -> v2.5.15
 * [new tag]         v2.5.16 -> v2.5.16

$ git ls-remote --tags origin | grep v2.5.1[3-6]
3bc8f6fe...  refs/tags/v2.5.13
313eb7fb...  refs/tags/v2.5.14
549cd483...  refs/tags/v2.5.15
bb2ebc58...  refs/tags/v2.5.16
```

4 个 commit + 4 个 annotated tag 都到 origin。verify on remote ✓。

**Note for future ship 节奏**：feature commit 之后我会直接 `git tag -a vX.Y.Z` + `git push origin main && git push origin vX.Y.Z` + `git ls-remote --tags origin` verify，不漏 tag。CHANGELOG 日期我已经在 feature commit 里 baked，所以省了「lock commit」一步——按 PM 节奏强化 "complete ship = 6 steps"，我这条 simplified 到 4 步（feature commit 已含 CHANGELOG）+ verify。
